consent.comment: AdOpt consent platform — ID is language-independent

popupClose.comment: Subscription/offers popup close button — data-testid is language-independent

hints: The calendar date picker shows two months side by side. Each month is inside a container with class 'calendar'. The first .calendar is the left month, the second .calendar (nth(1)) is the right month.
Calendar navigation arrows (ChevronRightIcon) are SVG elements with role='button' directly — not inside a <button> tag. Use .calendar [data-testid='ChevronRightIcon'] to scope to calendar only.

Calendar days are
  • N
    • . Days from adjacent months have aria-hidden='true' and must be excluded. ALWAYS use: locatorMethod 'locator', locatorArg '.calendar:first-of-type [data-testid="default-day"][aria-hidden="false"]', locatorOptions: { hasText: 'N' }, useFirst: true — where N is the day number from the step. For the second/right month use '.calendar:nth-of-type(2) [data-testid="default-day"][aria-hidden="false"]'. Never omit hasText and never omit aria-hidden filter.
The search autocomplete dropdown uses placeholder '¿A dónde vas a viajar?' in Spanish and 'Where are you going?' in English.
The check-in / check-out fields are readonly inputs with id='checkinrooms' and id='checkoutrooms'. They require forceClick to open the date picker.
